metadata.notes: Subset of NCCI PTP edits relevant to demo scenarios. Column 1 = payable code, Column 2 = denied code unless modifier applied.

edit_pairs.column_two_desc: MRI knee without then with contrast
edit_pairs.rationale: Mutually exclusive - cannot bill both non-contrast and with-contrast MRI of same knee
Bundling - contrast MRI includes non-contrast sequences
Fluoroscopy not separately reportable with MRI
Guidance included in MRI procedure
Overlapping anatomical region
Mutually exclusive - contrast CT includes non-contrast sequences

edit_pairs.column_two_desc: CT chest without then with contrast
edit_pairs.rationale: Bundling - combined CT includes single contrast study
Overlapping study with contrast CT
Fluoroscopy not separately reportable with CT

edit_pairs.column_two_desc: CT angiography abdomen and pelvis with chest
edit_pairs.rationale: Chest component already included
Acromioplasty is included in rotator cuff repair
Debridement is inherent to the repair procedure
Debridement is inherent to the repair procedure
Separate procedure but same session possible with modifier
Injection included in surgical approach
Diagnostic arthroscopy included in surgical arthroscopy
Diagnostic colonoscopy is included in colonoscopy with biopsy
Separate procedure possible with modifier
Can be separate procedure at different site
May be separately reportable with modifier
CT colonography not reportable with same-day colonoscopy
Different anatomical approach
Mutually exclusive - cannot bill both adult and congenital echo
Mutually exclusive with complete adult echo
Complete echo includes non-Doppler component
Follow-up echo is subset of complete echo
Doppler included in 93306 complete echo
Color flow Doppler included in 93306

73721.rationale: Bilateral knees possible, max 2 per day

71260.rationale: One chest CT with contrast per day

29827.rationale: Bilateral shoulders possible, max 2 per day

93306.rationale: Repeat studies possible in acute settings
